entries.name: referrals-check-vesting
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC. Transitions Referral.status vesting -> vested for rows past vesting_completes_at. Handles trigger_plus_hold_days, after_refund_window_closes, and n_events_completed vesting rules.

entries.name: referrals-materialize-vested
entries.purpose: Every 15 min. Picks vested-status rewards + calls Finance module to create pending credits. Sets finance_credit_id + materialized_at on success.

entries.name: referrals-expire-stale
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC. Transitions claimed-but-not-signed-up referrals past 30-day TTL to expired.

entries.name: referrals-reconcile-program-budget
entries.purpose: Nightly 05:00 UTC. Recomputes program budget counters + detects spikes. Every finding of drift > 0 is a P2 signal.

entries.name: referrals-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC. Hard-purge referrals + rewards + fraud flags past 7-year (or 10-year Enterprise) retention. Paid rewards > $600 migrate to compliance_archive first.
